{{Navbox |name = Indian philosophy |title = [[Indian philosophy]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Topics |list1 = * [[Atheism in Hinduism|Atheism]] * [[Atomism]] * [[Hindu idealism|Idealism]] * [[Indian logic|Logic]] * [[Hindu views on monotheism|Monotheism]] * [[Historical Vedic religion#Philosophy|Vedic philosophy]] * [[Kama]] * [[Artha]] * [[Moksha]]
| group2 = Ancient | list2 = {{Navbox|child | groupwidth = 6.6em | groupstyle = font-weight: normal; | evenodd = swap
| group1 =[[Hindu philosophy|Āstika]] |list1 = * [[Hindu philosophy|Hindu]]: [[Samkhya]] * [[Nyaya]] * [[Vaisheshika]] * [[Yoga Sutras of Patanjali|Yoga]] * [[Mīmāṃsā]] * [[Vedanta]] * [[Shaiva]] **[[Raseśvara]] ** [[Pashupata Shaivism]] *[[Pāṇini|Pāṇiniya]]
|group2 = [[Āstika and nāstika|Nāstika]] |list2 = * [[Ājīvika]] * [[Ajñana]] * [[Charvaka]] * [[Jain philosophy|Jain]] **[[Anekantavada]] ** [[Anekantavada#Syādvāda|Syādvāda]] * [[Buddhist philosophy]] and [[Early Buddhist schools]] **[[Śūnyatā]] ** [[Madhyamaka]] ** [[Yogachara]] ** [[Sautrāntika]] **[[Svatantrika]] }} |group3 = Medieval |list3 = * [[Vedanta]] ** [[Achintya Bheda Abheda|Acintya bheda abheda]] ** [[Advaita Vedanta|Advaita]] ** [[Bhedabheda]] ** [[Dvaita Vedanta|Dvaita]] ** [[Svabhavika Bhedabheda]] ** [[Shuddhadvaita]] ** [[Vishishtadvaita]] * [[Navya-Nyāya]] * [[Sikhism#Philosophy_and_teachings|Sikh Philosophy]] *[[Shaiva]] **[[Pratyabhijna]] **[[Pashupata Shaivism]] **[[Shaiva Siddhanta]] |group4 = Modern |list4 = *[[Integral yoga]] *[[Gandhism]] *[[M._N._Roy#Radical_humanist|Radical Humanism]] *[[Progressive utilization theory]] |group5 = Texts |list5 = * ''[[Abhinavabharati]]'' * ''[[Arthashastra]]'' * ''[[Bhagavad Gita]]'' * ''[[Bhagavata Purana]]'' * [[Brahma Sutras|''Brahma Sutra'']] * [[Buddhist texts]] * ''[[Dharmashastra]]'' * [[Hindu texts]] * [[Jain Agamas (Śvētāmbara)|Jain Agamas]] * ''[[Kamasutra]]'' * ''[[Mimamsa Sutras]]'' **[[Muktikā|All 108 texts]] **[[Mukhya Upanishads|Principal]] * [[Nyāya Sūtras]] * [[Nyayakusumanjali]] * ''[[Panchadasi]]'' * ''[[Samkhyapravachana Sutra]]'' * [[Sangam literature|Sangam texts]] * [[Sarva-Darsana-Sangraha|Sarvadarsanasangraha]] * [[Shiva Sutras of Vasugupta|Shiva Sutras]] * [[Tarka-Sangraha]] * ''[[Tattvacintāmaṇi]]'' * ''[[Tirukkuṟaḷ]]'' * [[Upanishads]] **[[Upanishads#Classification|Minor]] * ''[[Vaiśeṣika Sūtra]]'' * [[Vedanga]]s * [[Vedas]] * ''[[Yoga Sutras of Patanjali]]'' * ''[[Yoga Vasistha]]'' * [[sutra|More...]]
|group6 = Philosophers |list6 = * [[Adi Shankara]] * [[Abhinavagupta]] * [[Kumārila Bhaṭṭa]] * [[Maṇḍana Miśra]] * [[Valluvar]] * [[Avatsara]] * [[Vāchaspati Misra]] * [[Aruni|Uddalaka Aruni]] * [[Gautama Buddha]] * [[Yajnavalkya|Yājñavalkya]] * [[Gārgī Vāchaknavī]] * [[Buddhaghosa]] * [[Patanjali|Patañjali]] * [[Kaṇāda (philosopher)|Kanada]] * [[Kapila]] * [[Brihadratha Ikshvaku]] * [[Jaimini]] * [[Vyasa]] * [[Chanakya]] * [[Dharmakirti]] * [[Akshapada Gotama]] * [[Nagarjuna]] * [[Padmasambhāva]] * [[Vasubandhu]] * [[Gaudapada]] * [[Ramana Maharshi]] * [[Swami Vivekananda|Vivekananda]] * [[Dayananda Saraswati]] * [[Ramanuja]] * [[Vedanta Desika]] * [[Raikva]] * [[Sadananda (of Vedantasara)|Sadananda]] * [[Sakayanya]] * [[Satyakama Jabala]] * [[Madhvacharya]] * [[Mahavira]] * [[Guru Nanak]] * [[:Category:Indian philosophers|More...]]
|group7 = Concepts |list7 = * [[Abhava]] * [[Abhasavada]] * [[Non-difference (Abheda)|Abheda]] * [[Adarsana]] * [[Adrishta]] * [[Advaita Vedanta|Advaita]] * [[Aham (Kashmir Shaivism)|Aham]] * [[Ahimsa]] * [[Aishvarya]] * [[Akrodha]] * [[Aksara]] * [[Anatta]] * [[Ananta (infinite)|Ananta]] * [[Anavastha]] * [[Anupalabdhi]] * [[Apauruṣheyā]] * [[Artha]] * [[Asiddhatva]] * [[Asatkalpa]] * [[Ātman (Hinduism)|Ātman]] * [[Avyakta]] * [[Bhrama (Hinduism)|Bhrama]] * [[Brahman]] * [[Bhuman]] * [[Bhumika]] * [[Catuṣkoṭi]] * [[Chaitanya (consciousness)|Chaitanya]] * [[Chidabhasa]] * [[Cittabhumi]] * [[Dāna]] * [[Deva (Hinduism)|Devatas]] * [[Dharma]] * [[Dhi (Hindu thought)|Dhi]] * [[Dravya]] * [[Dhrti]] * [[Ekagrata]] * [[Guṇa]] * [[Hitā]] * [[Idam]] * [[Ikshana]] * [[Ishvaratva]] * [[Jivatva]] * [[Kama]] * [[Karma]] * [[Kasaya (attachment)|Kasaya]] * [[Kshetrajna]] * [[Lakshana]] * [[Matsya Nyaya]] * [[Mithyatva]] * [[moksha|Mokṣa]] * [[Nididhyasana]] * [[Nirvana|Nirvāṇa]] * [[Niyama]] * [[Padārtha]] * [[Paramatman]] * [[Paramananda (Hinduism)|Paramananda]] * [[Parameshashakti]] * [[Parinama-vada (Hindu thought)|Parinama-vada]] * [[Pradhana]] * [[Prajna (Vedic)|Prajna]] * [[Prakṛti]] * [[Pratibimbavada]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda]] * [[Purusha|Puruṣa]] * [[Rajamandala|Rājamaṇḍala]] * [[Ṛta]] * [[Sakshi (Witness)|Sakshi]] * [[Samadhi]] * [[Saṃsāra]] * [[Satya]] * [[Satkaryavada]] * [[Shabda Brahman]] * [[Sphoṭa]] * [[Sthiti]] * [[Śūnyatā]] * [[Sutram]] * [[Svatantrya|Svātantrya]] * [[Svecchamrityu (Iccha-mrityu)|Iccha-mrityu]] * [[Anekantavada#Syādvāda|Syādvāda]] * [[Taijasa]] * [[Tajjalan]] * [[Tanmatras|Tanmatra]] * [[Tyāga]] * [[Uparati]] * [[Upekkha|Upekkhā]] * [[Utsaha]] * [[Vivartavada]] * [[Viraj]] * [[Yamas]] * [[Yoga]] *[[:Category:Hindu philosophical concepts|More...]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Philosophy and thinking navigational boxes|{{PAGENAME}}]] </noinclude>
